commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content:
But (c) Caleb the son of Hesron took a wife named Azuba, of whom he begat Jerioth:
(c) Otherwise called Calubi. v. 9.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Gifts. Hebrew mincha, a word used to denote the offerings of bread, Leviticus ii. Here it signifies the tribute (Calmet) imposed on the conquered. (Haydock)
